PM to add new hardware to the IMAP server imap.EECS.Berkeley.EDU. The server will be rebooted several times during this time. You will not be able to read mail until the server is stable again which will be at 6PM. Microsoft will release their patche

ill be at 6PM. Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, Oct 11, 2005. HERMES, PRINT, RIS and WINSWW will be down for patching the following Wednesday, Oct 12, 2005, from 3:00 – 5:00pm. [Read more…] about HERMES, PRINT, RIS, and

:00pm. [Read more…] about HERMES, PRINT, RIS, and WINSWW Down for Patching The new Macintosh Server is up and running at macserver.eecs.berkeley.edu. Authentication is via your Windows Domain user name and password. Use Cmd+k to open the “go to serve

e and password. Use Cmd+k to open the “go to server” window and type, smb://macserver.eecs.berkeley.edu. If your host is already in the domain no authentication in needed. If your host in not in the domain you will need to authenticate. The service s

omain you will need to authenticate. The service so far is a shared folder, macsww. It contains a public folder of software for the Macintosh. I am still working on the Matlab installer, everything else should work. Please let me know if you have pro

se should work. Please let me know if you have problems, I welcome your emails as Macintosh support is new to EECS and this is a work in progress. Thank you. Hi all, We are pleased to announced our first EECS Town Hall meeting for this semester (FY05

rst EECS Town Hall meeting for this semester (FY05-06). It will be held in Woz Lounge, Oct. 11, from 2 to 4pm. Since this is our first meeting this fiscal year, there will be a lot of IT related information that we want to share, including upcoming

rmation that we want to share, including upcoming deployments of the EECS IT security plans, various large scale campus activities, and many other new EECS services that are/will be in place throughout the year. We encourage you to attend, and pleas

t the year. We encourage you to attend, and please share the news with others that might be interested. More detailed agenda will be posted in the IRIS web site when it is available. There will be light refreshments, and please do bring your commen

ight refreshments, and please do bring your comments and suggestions with you! Thanks. Due to the breakdown with Print and Winsww, Macserver is behind schedule. I sincerely apologize for the delay! The server will be online tomorrow after 12:00 noon.

e server will be online tomorrow after 12:00 noon. Thank you for your understanding and patience. IMAP Service is temporarily unavailable. IRIS staff are currently working on the problem. [Read more…] about IMAP Server Temporarily Down We are pleased

about IMAP Server Temporarily Down We are pleased to be offering Mac OSX (10.4) as a supported platform in EECS, effective 10/01/05. Due to limited staffing and resources, comprehensive support for Macs (desktops and laptops) will be limited to Mac

Macs (desktops and laptops) will be limited to Mac OS 10.4 and higher only. The following is an estimated schedule for this deployment. Please direct your feedbacks and comments to me (hpc@eecs), thank you. IRIS web site FAQ (How-To documents): av

(vpn, calendar, ssh, ftp, virus); Remote installation service: ETA Dec 2005 Security scanning: ETA 2006 Helpdesk support: available 9/30 Due to the continued networking and hardware problems on PRINT, a new windows print server, PRINT2, is in the pr

, a new windows print server, PRINT2, is in the process of being built. I expect the server to be on line tomorrow. To smooth this transition, PRINT2 will immediately begin service for queues that have been experiencing sever outages on PRINT. More a

e been experiencing sever outages on PRINT. More announcements will be posted as the transition from PRINT to PRINT2 continues. Thank you for your patience. [Read more…] about Windows Print Server Update The Windows Server WINSWW is still being repai

ate The Windows Server WINSWW is still being repaired, and will be down till mid day tomorrow. Thank you. [Read more…] about WINSWW update While the Windows Print Server PRINT is back up and functioning, many of you are still experiencing problems pr
